data.title: Traction Uranium Announces Marketing Program
data.description: A company based in Calgary, Alberta, Traction Uranium Corp. (CSE: TRAC) (OTC: TRCTF) (FRA: Z1K), has announced its collaboration with Nordcore Media LLC for online marketing services. Nordcore's address is 30 N Gould St Ste R Sheridan, WY 82801, and their contact email is jrojas@nordcoremedia.net. The engagement is expected to last for approximately four months, starting on May 3, 2026, or until the budget is fully utilized. Management retains the right to extend or shorten the marketing services period as needed.

data.title: NEDHSA Expands Community Impact Through Strategic Partnership with Chennault Aviation & Military Museum, Advancing Veteran-Focused Initiatives
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Monroe, Louisiana, the Northeast Delta Human Services Authority (NEDHSA) and the Chennault Aviation & Military Museum disclosed a fresh strategic alliance aimed at enhancing community well-being, enhancing services for veterans, and reinforcing regional collaboration. This partnership seeks to leverage resources to benefit the community, including integrating wellness programs, boosting assistance for veterans, and fostering cohesion within the region. The initiative aims to serve a significant number of individuals in the area, promoting better health outcomes and providing vital support to veterans.

data.title: URANIUM ROYALTY ANNOUNCES CLOSING OF SUBSCRIPTION RECEIPT PRIVATE PLACEMENT
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on May 1, 2026, Uranium Royalty Corp. (NASDAQ: UROY) (TSX: URC) successfully completed its recent private placement of subscription receipts. The Subscription Receipts were issued to Uranium Energy Corp. This transaction marks a significant development for URC as it aims to expand its operations and investments in the uranium sector.

data.title: Northrop Grumman Honors Top Suppliers Driving Industrial Innovation
data.description: Northrop Grumman has acknowledged top American and international suppliers for their contributions to the company's operations, particularly in terms of speed, capacity, manufacturing, and supply chain logistics.

data.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On May 01, 2026, NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V., a biopharmaceutical company based in Naarden, the Netherlands and Miami, announced the approval of granting inducement share options by the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors. The options cover a total of 50,400 ordinary shares of the Company and have been offered to five new non-executive hires. This move is part of the company's efforts in developing oral medications for patients at cardiovascular disease risk with high LDL cholesterol levels. The share options were granted as a material inducement for these new employees to join the company as per the NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. 2024 Inducement Plan and comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Trident Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Determination Letter and Intent to Request Hearing
data.description: Singapore-based Trident Digital Tech Holdings Ltd, a key player in digital transformation and Web 3.0 activation services, recently disclosed that it was notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on April 28, 2026 about its non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The rule mandates listed securities to uphold a minimum bid price of US$1.00 per share for a minimum of 10 consecutive business days within a 180-day period, ending on April 27, 2026. Due to this, Trident's listed securities failed to meet this requirement. As a result, the company is addressing this issue to maintain compliance with Nasdaq regulations.

data.title: Pacific Health Care Organization, Inc. Reports its First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Irvine, CA - On May 1, 2026, Pacific Health Care Organization, Inc. (OTCQB: PFHO) submitted its quarterly report on Form 10-Q to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The report details the Company's financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Trident Resources Engages Marketing Groups and Announces the Recent Exercise of 1.38M Warrants for $1.87M in Cash
data.description: Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) from Vancouver, BC, disclosed that it has initiated collaborations with multiple marketing agencies to elevate investor awareness as per its strategic plan. The company further revealed that it recently executed over 1.38 million warrants, generating cash inflow of CAD $1.87 million.

data.title: HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding Hosts “Signing Day” Celebrating Shipbuilder Academy Graduates
data.description: Today in Pascagoula, Mississippi, HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division held "Signing Day" to honor 49 high school seniors from the Gulf Coast who finished the Ingalls Shipbuilder Academy (ISA) and received employment offers from the company. This event mirrors athletic signings and marks the students' official commitment to beginning their careers in shipbuilding.

data.title: PharmaCorp Completes Acquisition of Pharmacy Files in Western Canada
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan on May 01, 2026, PHARMACORP RX INC. ("PharmaCorp" or "Corporation") (TSXV: PCRX), a Canadian pharmacy acquisition and ownership platform focusing on pharmacist-led community pharmacy ownership, has successfully completed the acquisition of prescription files, patient records, and related operational data (referred to as "Pharmacy Files") from an arm's length vendor. This acquisition pertains to a pharmacy situated in the same community as one of PharmaCorp’s existing PharmaChoice-bannered pharmacies in Western Canada. The total acquisition cost amounted to $300,000, which was paid with available cash and may be adjusted as per customary terms. Notably, no finder’s fees were involved in this transaction.

data.title: ROCK'N Vodka & Bella Rio Bourbon Expand With Historic Release and Strategic Growth--Continued Investment Opportunity
data.description: ROCK'N Vodka, an acclaimed vodka brand, has expanded into a multi-brand spirits platform through a joint venture with the Bella Rio Brand House. This collaboration has led to an acceleration in growth, exemplified by the recent launch of a bourbon product. Operating out of ROCKFORD, Ill., this partnership is marked by a community-driven investment approach. This development, announced on May 1, 2026, showcases the company's commitment to progress and diversification in the spirits industry.

data.title: FLUENT Enters into Definitive Agreement to sell Texas Business
data.description: Legacy Therapeutics, LLC announces plans to acquire FLUENT’s Texas operations and license. This strategic acquisition will encompass all aspects of FLUENT’s operations in Texas, including its existing license. The deal is valued at approximately $5 million and is expected to be finalized by the end of the fiscal quarter. This acquisition marks a significant move in Legacy Therapeutics' expansion efforts in the region.

data.title: Exodus Movement Acquires Outstanding Shares of Monavate Holdings Limited and Baanx.com Ltd.
data.description: Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD) revealed its acquisition of Monavate Holdings Limited and Baanx.com Ltd., formerly subsidiaries of W3C Corp, from appointed Receivers in the UK. The takeover amount stands at $76,273,333.30, equivalent to the total principal and interest owed on the defaulted loan as of April 30, 2026. Exodus, a prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency platform, finalized this deal, solidifying its position in the market.
